{{Quote|Bella, deal with this rabble.|Cavik Toth|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
'''Bella''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cavik Toth]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she flew a [[Bella's assault transport|personal assault transport]] and commanded the destroyer [[Reaver (Sabaoth destroyer)|''Reaver'']].

==History==
Bella was [[Cavik Toth]]'s most trusted lieutenant. She oversaw the test of Toth's new weapon [[Trihexalon]] on [[Point Modie]] on the planet [[Maramere]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and [[Reti]] intervened to protect the innocents. Despite the results showing that the test was successful, Bella wanted to finish off the city. However, Adi Gallia managed to stop any more severe damage to the city.

Bella was then on the [[Sabaoth destroyer|Sabaoth Destroyer]] [[Reaver (Sabaoth destroyer)|''Reaver'']] commencing a salvage run on the [[Orbital Defense Cannon]]. However the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] had the same idea which resulted in her forces on a ''Tug of War'' for the parts, Bella lost all of the parts but she did have a back-up plan in case of this. She sent a couple of [[Sabaoth Frigate]]s to try to stop the [[Tritus]] from heading to [[Lok/Legends|Lok]] but even that had failed. She then went to Lok with Toth make a stand against the Lok Revenants but the pirates placed the Orbital Defense Cannon on one of Lok's moons known as [[Khons]] which started the [[Battle of Lok (22 BBY)|Second Battle of Lok]].

After the defenses failed and [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] destroyed the foundry. Lieutenant Bella decided to take the fight with Nym in her [[Bella's assault transport|personal assault transport]]. Despite overwhelming firepower she was killed in a dogfight with Nym.

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Let's see how these vermin burn.|Bella while deploying [[Trihexalon]] on [[Point Modie]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter" />}}
Bella, like Toth, was cruel and heartless. Bella was adamant on destroying Point Modie with the Trihexalon despite reaching satisfying conclusions on the weapons test. While she could come up with back-up plans in case of failure, she didn't tolerate it calling her forces 'incompetent [[Worm/Legends|worms]]' and threatened them by saying that "if you want to live another day kill them all". Like Toth, she didn't seem to accept defeat even when she was facing it.

==Behind the scenes==
There are two ways to defeat Bella. One is to dogfight her; the second is to wait until her craft slows down to a crawl and target her for the Orbital Defense Cannon. This requires timing but if done correct her ship will suffer a direct hit from the cannon and will be destroyed. "Bella" in Italian means Beauty.

She is voiced by [[Sterling James]] in the game ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''.
